message:
feat(cli): implement pt agent inbox command for notifications

Add inbox system for viewing pending plans from dormant mode escalations
and other automated notifications.

## New Features
- InboxStore for persistent JSONL storage
- InboxItem types: dormant_escalation, lock_contention, respawn_detected,
  calibration_drift, maintenance_reminder, manual
- InboxResponse with unread_count tracking
- Acknowledgement and clear mechanisms

## CLI Usage
- `pt agent inbox` - List all items (JSON format)
- `pt agent inbox --unread` - Show only unread items
- `pt agent inbox --ack <id>` - Acknowledge an item
- `pt agent inbox --clear` - Clear acknowledged items
- `pt agent inbox --clear-all` - Clear all items

## Output Formats
- JSON, JSONL, summary, metrics, markdown, prose, exitcode

Also includes verify.rs module (stub implementation for agent verify).

Resolves: process_triage-iqe

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
